parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)

risk.desc: Thermal cycling may cause unexpected deformation due to material properties.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate deformation limits.

risk.desc: Launch vibration may exceed structural integrity limits.
risk.mit: Perform vibration analysis and modify design if necessary.

risk.desc: Radiation exposure may degrade material properties over time.
risk.mit: Use radiation-hardened materials and conduct long-term radiation exposure tests.

physics_paths.description: Vibration loads from launch are distributed through the frame to the mounting points.
Solar radiation heats the frame, which conducts heat to the internal components.
Heat from internal components is conducted to the frame and radiated to space.
Electrical connections between boards and frame provide grounding and power distribution.
Ground station personnel access the frame for maintenance and inspection.
